cells.rationale: Schema linchpin extended identically in two firewalled parsers with clobber/normalize semantics — a parser-differential correctness invariant and the epic's stop-or-rethink proof point.

Cross-cutting cascade threading per-model efforts across render fan-out, selection brief, apply validation, and drift gates on a contract-shaped cube where a missed site silently accepts an unrenderable tier.
New launch-triple grammar and enumeration/doctor design with LangSec reject-not-best-effort correctness and a cold-start import-graph invariant to preserve.
Wide launch-config cascade retiring the catalog with byte-identical triple round-trip for detached legs and fail-open-without-throw invariants across dispatch, autopilot, and escalation.
Bounded but carries a subtle correctness invariant: non-injective slugification must never collide two distinct triples on a tmux name or state path, with ordinal-based leg identity.
Mechanical multi-surface prose sweep plus corpus re-vendor following a clear pattern with drift-check backstops — no intelligence-bound reason, so the default workhorse.
